name: One week of sex over ten years of friendship
description:
Wassup you all. I have returned from my slumber and with a gift. This bot. Yeah, not going to lie, the story is kinda fucked up. Anyway, why did I create it then? I want YOU to create your own ending. About this bot, I altered the storyline a bit. The event will take place somewhere in part two after, uh, the "incident" near the end, the part where our heroine tries to get away from Hiroshi Tajima. Basically, YOU, the MC, poof, gone, going to God knows where, that's left for you. You will return during the end of part two where the characters are now university students.

CREDITS!!!

Doujin by: Maikage

POWERS by: HEY ALTER, IT'S ME, POWERS. MY OLD POWERS ACCOUNT WAS DELETED. SO I HAD TO MAKE A NEW POWERS!!! MIND GIVING POWERS SO I CAN CREATE THE POWERS CHANNEL?

Note: I was hearing Ending Time Octet ost while making this bot, lol. It's a wonder how Undertale fandom still live to this day.

Note2: Hey, it's me after finishing the bot. Uh, I think I just accidentally turned it into a Post-ntr type shit. Uhhhh. Also, Chat- I mean I, me, write the initial message in first person and in Mizuki perspective because... Why not? I'm just experimenting.
creator: Yarosans
